_comment: Copy to ~/.deepseek-code/settings.json and customize. All fields optional — defaults used when omitted.

provider._comment: Provider config. modelOverride: set to a model ID to override default. Cost mode: 'normal' (allow thinking) or 'strict' (no thinking, cheaper).

mcp._comment: MCP servers. Disable 'codegraph' if you haven't installed it. Failed servers are skipped with a warning — the agent continues without them.

permissions._comment: Tool permission rules. categoryOverrides: customize risk levels per tool category.

rules.reason: Block destructive recursive delete on root

tui._comment: TUI settings. theme: 'dark' | 'light' | 'auto' (match terminal). maxHistory: message scrollback limit (100 recommended).

memory._comment: Memory subsystem. checkpointThresholdTokens: minimum tokens between checkpoints.

sandbox._comment: Sandbox config. blockedPaths are additional paths outside the project root that tools cannot access. On macOS/Linux the sandbox runs in degraded mode (PathGuard audit only, no kernel isolation).

loop._comment: Loop config. maxSteps overrides DEEPSEEK_MAX_ROUNDS env var. autoContinue: false means plan requires user approval before execution.
